meaning: n.[医]活组织检查,活组织切片检查
examples: A biopsy is usually a minor surgical procedure.
James had a biopsy of the tumour over his right ear.
A skin biopsy showed leukocytoclastic vasculitis.
He performed a biopsy to remove the nodule, which turned out to be benign.
It took three more tests, including a lung-tissue biopsy, to nail it down as TB.
